title: salix × devestita
intro: Salix × devestita, also known as hybrid willow or weeping willow, is a hybrid plant species of the willow family (Salicaceae) resulting from the cross between Salix alba and Salix matsudana. This plant has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, particularly in treating fever, rheumatism, and skin conditions due to its anti-inflammatory and antioxidant compounds. The health benefits of Salix × devestita include its ability to reduce inflammation, improve circulation, and provide relief from anxiety and stress. Salix × devestita is often used in herbal preparations such as infusions, tinctures, and salves, which can be applied topically or taken orally to harness its medicinal properties.
